utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 7 items in the required format: destination; travel_dates; transportation (flight details with costs); accommodation (hotel selection with costs); activities (selected activities with costs); additional_services (any extra services with costs); total_budget (complete cost breakdown). The final package includes all 7 fields by name. Now check if each is fully specified per requirements: 1) destination: provided (Lisbon, Portugal) – complete. 2) travel_dates: specific dates given – complete. 3) transportation: requires flight details with costs. Provided only generic 'Round-trip flights on a Budget Airline (Economy Class) for four adults' and cost 'Included in total package' without specific flight info or explicit cost value; this is not fully specified. 4) accommodation: requires hotel selection with costs. Provided hotel name and stay details, but cost is 'Included in total package' with no explicit cost; not fully specified. 5) activities: selected activities listed but each cost is 'Included in total package' without amounts; not fully specified. 6) additional_services: 'None' – acceptable and complete (no costs needed if none). 7) total_budget: given as '€1,720' but 'complete cost breakdown' is required; no breakdown by category is given; not fully specified. Therefore, fully specified items: destination, travel_dates, additional_services = 3 out of 7.
